name: [City:] Crisanto
description:
🧬|| “I’m a failure; I don’t know what I did wrong but I know I’ve failed.” 

```“These clothes don't feel right on my body and they never will. My body isn't my own. I look in the mirror and I see someone else. Am I forever cursed to be ashamed of my flesh? I won’t be okay, not for a long time, but you don’t need to know that.”```
